notes: Malformed output (unrepairable, orchestrator decision stage): technical and intel stages complete normally, but the decision stage returns plain prose with no braces and no code fence, so every parse strategy (code block, raw, json_repair, brace substring) fails. Characterizes that the decision-stage parse failure is NOT fatal in the orchestrator: the pipeline synthesizes a degraded dashboard from the completed technical/intel stage opinions (signal=buy, success=true, error=null). Contrast with contract-fallback-provider-error and the single-agent parse path, where failures surface as success=false.
